title: oreopteris quelpartensis var. yaku-montana
intro: Oreopteris quelpartensis var. yaku-montana, also known as Yaku-montane tree fern, is a variety of tree fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Oreopteris quelpartensis var. yaku-montana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the Yaku-montane tree fern are often used to make tea or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
